criteria.name: Task Automation
criteria.description: Ability to automate repetitive tasks and orchestrate complex processes.

criteria.name: Knowledge Management
criteria.description: Effectiveness in managing and transforming scattered information into actionable insights.

criteria.name: Meeting Transcription and Action Items
criteria.description: Capability to transcribe meetings, identify key decisions, and assign tasks.

criteria.name: Writing Assistance
criteria.description: Quality of AI-powered writing assistance, including tone adjustments and grammar checks.

criteria.name: Project Management
criteria.description: Efficiency in project management, including task prioritization and resource allocation.

criteria.name: Email Mastery
criteria.description: Effectiveness in predicting important messages and generating replies.

criteria.name: Calendar Optimization
criteria.description: Ability to resolve meeting conflicts and maximize deep-work hours.
